tasks.subject: Task 0: Pure config module (rowMenuConfig.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A dependency-free module defining the kebab menu model + all pure operations, fully unit-tested.

**Files:**
- Create: src/lib/rowMenuConfig.ts
- Test: src/lib/rowMenuConfig.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Exports RowMenuItemId, DEFAULT_ROW_MENU_ORDER, RowMenuConfig, DEFAULT_ROW_MENU_CONFIG, ROW_MENU_STORAGE_KEY, ROW_MENU_OPEN_EVENT.
- normalizeConfig resilient (drops unknown, de-dupes, appends missing in default order, clamps hidden).
- moveItem / toggleHidden / resolveRowMenuOrder per tests.
- load/save round-trip localStorage; never throw on storage failure.

**Verify:** npm test -- src/lib/rowMenuConfig.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/rowMenuConfig.ts", "src/lib/rowMenuConfig.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- src/lib/rowMenuConfig.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exports full public API", "normalizeConfig coerces any input", "helpers behave per tests", "load/save never throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: RowMenuContext provider + app/test wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RowMenuProvider/useRowMenu() exposing { config, setOrder, toggleHidden, reset }, persisting on change, mounted in App, available to all component tests.

**Files:**
- Create: src/contexts/RowMenuContext.tsx
- Test: src/contexts/RowMenuContext.test.tsx
- Modify: src/App.tsx, src/__test__/providers.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Hook returns { config, setOrder, toggleHidden, reset }; mutations persist to sts2mm-row-menu.
- No-provider use falls back to DEFAULT_ROW_MENU_CONFIG (no throw); mutators safe no-ops.
- Provider wraps app in App.tsx and present in AllProviders.

**Verify:** npm test -- src/contexts/RowMenuContext.test.tsx src/App.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/contexts/RowMenuContext.tsx", "src/contexts/RowMenuContext.test.tsx", "src/App.tsx", "src/__test__/providers.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- src/contexts/RowMenuContext.test.tsx src/App.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hook exposes API and persists", "no-provider fallback no throw", "mounted in App + AllProviders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fix Copy-version double-v (label + toast)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Copy-version label + toast show a single v regardless of mod.version prefix. Clipboard unchanged (raw). No locale files changed.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/LibraryRow.tsx:827, src/hooks/useModLibrary.tsx:426
- Test: src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx, src/hooks/useModLibrary.test.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Label 'Copy version (v1.2.3)' for v1.2.3 and 1.2.3.
- Toast 'Copied v1.0.0' for v1.0.0 and 1.0.0.
- Clipboard receives raw mod.version.
- No locale JSON changed.

**Verify:** npm test -- src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx src/hooks/useModLibrary.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/LibraryRow.tsx", "src/hooks/useModLibrary.tsx", "src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx", "src/hooks/useModLibrary.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx src/hooks/useModLibrary.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single v in label", "single v in toast", "clipboard raw", "no locale change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Descriptor-driven kebab (drop Edit-sources, config order/hide, locked Delete + Customize footer)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace LibraryRowKebab hardcoded JSX with a descriptor map rendered in user order (minus hidden/unavailable) as a flat list; remove Edit-sources; pin locked Delete (packScoped) + locked Customize footer dispatching ROW_MENU_OPEN_EVENT.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/LibraryRow.tsx, src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx
- Modify: src/i18n/locales/{en,zh-Hans,ru,ar}.json (mods.customizeMenu, mods.customizeMenuDesc)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No Edit-sources item; row-click still opens SourceEditor.
- Items render in config.order; hidden removed; reorder reorders DOM.
- Unavailable contextual items omitted.
- packScoped Delete last before Customize, config-independent.
- Customize always last, dispatches ROW_MENU_OPEN_EVENT.
- Light-theme safe (manual).

**Verify:** npm test -- src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/LibraryRow.tsx", "src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- src/components/LibraryRow.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Edit-sources removed", "order+hidden honored", "unavailable omitted", "Delete pinned above Customize", "Customize last + dispatches event", "parity passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Settings customizer card (RowMenuCustomizer)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Settings -> General card listing the 11 customizable items with show/hide toggle + native drag reorder, plus Reset + locked-items caption. Edits via useRowMenu().

**Files:**
- Create: src/components/RowMenuCustomizer.tsx, src/components/RowMenuCustomizer.test.tsx
- Modify: src/views/Settings.tsx, src/styles.css, src/i18n/locales/{en,zh-Hans,ru,ar}.json (settings.rowMenu.*)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Lists 11 items in config.order with icon + label + toggle.
- Toggle hides/shows (persists); drag reorders via moveItem (persists).
- Reset restores DEFAULT_ROW_MENU_CONFIG.
- Locked items shown disabled + caption.
- Light-theme safe (manual).

**Verify:** npm test -- src/components/RowMenuCustomizer.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/RowMenuCustomizer.tsx", "src/components/RowMenuCustomizer.test.tsx", "src/views/Settings.tsx", "src/styles.css", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- src/components/RowMenuCustomizer.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lists 11 items with toggles", "toggle+drag persist", "reset restores default", "locked footer disabled + caption", "parity passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Deep-link Customize menu -> Settings (event receiver + scroll/highlight)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dispatching ROW_MENU_OPEN_EVENT routes to Settings -> General and scrolls/highlights the customizer card.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/App.tsx, src/views/Settings.tsx, src/App.test.tsx, src/views/Settings.test.tsx, src/styles.css

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Event switches activeView to settings.
- Signal bump selects General tab, scrolls card into view, briefly highlights.
- No App/Settings regressions.
- Full suite + coverage 96/96/90 pass.

**Verify:** npm test -- src/App.test.tsx src/views/Settings.test.tsx ; then npm test (full) + build.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/App.tsx", "src/views/Settings.tsx", "src/App.test.tsx", "src/views/Settings.test.tsx", "src/styles.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm test -- src/App.test.tsx src/views/Settings.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["event navigates to Settings", "signal scroll+highlight", "no regressions", "full suite + coverage pass"]}
```
